description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house set on a landscaped lot with a mix of natural and designed elements. The structure features large glass windows, clean geometric lines, and a combination of white and neutral-toned exterior walls. The property includes a swimming pool, a patio area with outdoor seating, and a driveway leading to a garage. Lush greenery, including trees and shrubs, surrounds the house, while a cluster of large, naturalistic boulders with flowering plants adds a dramatic touch to one side. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, integration with nature, and contemporary architectural aesthetics.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large glass windows, landscaped gardens, a pool, and dramatic boulders, blending contemporary design with natural elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, pool, patio, and prominent boulders with flowering plants.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dense greenery, trees, and the garage area, with the house partially obscured by landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the driveway, garage entrance, and a more private garden area with trees and shrubs.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the rocky landscape feature, flowering plants, and the house's integration with its natural surroundings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide glass door, and minimalistic steps, flanked by landscaping and open patio space.
